pattern: A bitmask assignment DP pairs each student with an unused mentor to maximize the total count of matching answers.
hints: First precompute the compatibility score between every student and every mentor as the number of equal answers.
This is an optimal one-to-one assignment problem on a small square cost matrix.
Use DP over a bitmask of used mentors: dp[mask] is the best score after assigning the first popcount(mask) students, trying each unused mentor for the next student.

edge_inputs.description: three-way assignment with a clear optimum
single student and mentor matching fully
swapping the obvious pairing is better
all answers equal so any assignment is maximal

stress.generator_python:
def gen(rng, size):
    m = max(1, min(size, 8))
    n = rng.randrange(1, 9)
    students = [[rng.randrange(0, 2) for _ in range(n)] for _ in range(m)]
    mentors = [[rng.randrange(0, 2) for _ in range(n)] for _ in range(m)]
    return [students, mentors]
